title: centaurea × pomoensis
intro: Centaurea × pomoensis, also known as Poterium sanguisorba, is a hybrid perennial plant in the family Rosaceae, characterized by its attractive white or pinkish flowers and edible leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea × pomoensis include its ability to reduce bleeding, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
